title: Make AI agent execute 80% faster ⏱️🏆
summary: Google Cloud Tech demonstrates latency optimization for an AI agent in a sports analysis app, reducing execution time by 80% through workflow parallelization. The optimization was performed on the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform using OpenTelemetry for bottleneck identification and the Antigravity IDE for implementation.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech video walks through latency optimization for an AI agent in a sports analysis app, cutting execution time by 80% via workflow parallelization. The work runs on the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, using OpenTelemetry to identify bottlenecks and the Antigravity IDE to implement the changes. The core takeaway: instrumenting an agent to find serial bottlenecks and then parallelizing the workflow yields large runtime gains.
